title: Silky Peruvian Garlic Stir-fry
description: A silky peruvian garlic stir fry meal prep dish featuring a flavorful blend of ingredients that is both nut-free and friendly.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic, green peppers, red onions, jalepeño, salt, and pepper. Stir-fry for about 3-4 minutes until vegetables start to soften but not mushy.
If using fish sauce, add it now along with tomato paste and stir well to combine. The mixture will thicken slightly as the oil evaporates.
Pour in coconut milk and let simmer until thickened and glossy, stirring occasionally for about 5-6 minutes. The sauce should coat your back spoon nicely when poured out.
Garnish with cilantro (optional) and serve hot over rice or quinoa.
